title: A Wandering Artisan
description: A notable craftsman seeks help

requirements.label: Visibility requirements: Complete AER Bonus and quest is unsolved

title: The Artisan's Prize
description: This achievement is gained by obtaining The Artisan's Prize from Lebounde in Halas:

requirements.label: Lebounde ab Dolmen - The Artisan's Prize
Craft the Earring of the Solstice
Craft the Signet of the Arcane (or Signet of Might)
(Optional) Help Lebounde restock his supplies (Requires 300 skill and a level 7 Trophy)
Visibility requirements: Completed scavenger hunt and quest solved on this server

title: The Artisan's Wares
description: This achievement is gained upon recovering all of Lebounde's lost equipment:

requirements.label: Recover all 16 pieces of Lebounde's lost equipment:
Visibility requirements: Quest has been solved on this server

title: The Artisan's Work
description: Lebounde in Halas has returned to work

requirements.label: Visibility requirements: Completed scavenger hunt and quest is unsolved
